授業目的: The purpose of this course is communicate in Spanish with Spanish speakers. The students will be able to create basic dialogues and understand basic instructions.
到達目標: The students will be able to: 1. Practicing everyday conversations. 2. Reading aloud. 3. Conversing with your classmates.

第1回:
【Startup Week】
Online class (On-demand format) ／ 《90 minutes》
Introduce your self.
Review exercises from the previous class and prepare for the next class.
第2回:
【Core Weeks①】
Face-to-face class ／ 《90 minutes》
Discuss about different shows.
Review exercises from the previous class and prepare for the next class.
